commits: a869c1e: design(0.8.1/slice-25): R2 harness design memo
dd5a5c1: test(0.8.1/slice-25): RED — harness contract, per-class scorer, corpus pin, output schema
dedca93: feat(0.8.1/slice-25): R2 parity eval harness — identical-answerer, Mem0-OSS + naive-RAG adapters, per-class scorer
e13d8ec: docs(0.8.1/slice-25): X3 — R2 results doc, run artifact, DOC-INDEX
b45effa: perf(0.8.1/slice-25): NaiveRAGAdapter uses an inverted index
fathomdb_arm_note: FathomDB ran lexical/FTS-only (use_default_embedder=False); the dense+RRF-fused production arm needs the BGE embedder (not available here). The FathomDB-vs-naive comparison is lexical-vs-lexical. See dev/plans/runs/IR-C-r2-eval-results.md §3.

blockers_encountered.description: no answerer LLM in env (no OPENAI/ANTHROPIC key, no ollama/local server); the frozen gold also has no answer strings. Per-class answerer_accuracy + abstention left null (not 0.0).
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — set R2_ANSWERER_BASE_URL + R2_ANSWERER_MODEL + R2_RUN=1 (BYO local OpenAI-compatible shim). LLMAnswerer path implemented + gated.

blockers_encountered.description: mem0ai not installed and its add()/search() require a local LLM + embedding backend that is absent; cloud Mem0 forbidden (ADR §3.6). Mem0 arm skipped; comparison is FathomDB vs naive-RAG.
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — pip install mem0ai + configure a local backend; Mem0OSSAdapter (lazy) is implemented.

blockers_encountered.description: the frozen FathomDB gold (qrels ir-c-reused-v1) carries only exact_fact/exploratory/negative; temporal/multi_hop/knowledge_update/multi_session have N=0. These are the Slice 30 go/no-go classes.
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — needs LongMemEval (own haystack + answerer; not locally cloneable) or memory-class QA pairs generated from the corpus with an offline LLM. R2Harness consumes either with no code change.

blockers_encountered.description: BGE embedder weights unavailable, so FathomDB ran FTS-only; the dense + RRF-fused + R1 reranker + R3 graph arm were not exercised.
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — run with use_default_embedder=True (BGE cached) to exercise the fused arm; no harness change.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: pyproject.toml: added [tool.pytest.ini_options] pythonpath=['.'] + pyright include 'eval' so the test-infra eval/ package resolves (not shipped in the wheel).
NaiveRAGAdapter uses an inverted index (postings) — identical BM25 scores, tractable over the full 4597-query corpus (perf commit b45effa).
COR-2 verified via freeze_corpus.py --reproduce: corpus_hash MATCH fe973fcd…, bit-identical.
FathomDB arm ran lexical/FTS-only (embedder absent) — documented caveat (results doc §3).
reserved_gap_candidates: Zep-OSS adapter (reserved follow-on 26–29) — not built; needs Zep-OSS infra + LLM, out of this slice's feasible scope.
R2 parity-metric AC (minted at the eval gate, HITL) — threshold determined from R2 data; not minted (acceptance.md locked; mint only at gated slices).
Memory-class gold acquisition (LongMemEval clone or offline-LLM QA generation) to populate temporal/multi_hop/knowledge_update/multi_session.
Embedder-enabled fused run (use_default_embedder=True) to exercise FathomDB's dense + R1 + R3 arms.
Answerer-accuracy column once a local answerer LLM is available.

self_check.mkdocs_build_strict: clean (docs under dev/, no nav change)

next_step_for_orchestrator: Slice 25 merged at a1cd7d9. r2_per_class_deltas populated for factoid (+0.0017 recall vs naive) + exploratory (-0.0291); temporal/multi_hop/knowledge_update/multi_session are null (N=0, no gold) and answerer_accuracy is null (no LLM). The Slice 30 (R3) go/no-go is DATA-LIMITED → per prompt §11 escalate to HITL; do NOT flip use_graph_arm=true on absent data. Run codex §9 measurement-neutrality review next.
